parent.name: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle

km.Whethill, Shropshire, England: shរ៉ុពស៊ីរe, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, uណៃteត គីnហ្គដុម

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Whethill I於1296年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，他的父親Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle25歲，母親Mrs. Richard Whetehill25歲。他和Mrs. Richard Whetehill I至少有1個兒子。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Whethill I于1296年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾时，他的父亲Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle25岁，母亲Mrs. Richard Whetehill25岁。他和Mrs. Richard Whetehill I至少有1个儿子。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Whethill I was born in 1296, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle, was 25 and his mother, Mrs. Richard Whetehill, was 25. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Richard Whetehill I. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Whethill I est né en 1296, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard Whetehill, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Richard Whetehill I. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Whethill I 1296 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle 25 und seine Mutter Mrs. Richard Whetehill 25. Er hatte mit Mrs. Richard Whetehill I mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Whethill I è nato il nel 1296 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Richard Whetehill, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Richard Whetehill I. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Whethill, Shropshire, England: イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill Iが1296年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castleは25歳，母Mrs. Richard Whetehillは25歳であった。彼はMrs. Richard Whetehill Iとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill I(이)가 1296년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Richard Whetehill(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Mrs. Richard Whetehill I(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Whethill I nasceu em 1296, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard Whetehill, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Richard Whetehill I. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Whethill I родился в 1296 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard Whetehill, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Richard Whetehill I. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Whethill I nació en 1296, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs. Richard Whetehill, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Richard Whetehill I. Murió en su pueblo.
